reviews.review_description: The app is very straight forward, and easy to use, if you are into the story and the history it will go through a huge timeline with several characters and explore in an unconventional way the history and happenings of the street, the more you progress in the app the more characters and exciting animations , especially liked the speech of the pilgrim, and the two ladies from Alexandria.

reviews.review_title: Much more than expected. Great education
reviews.review_description: This was much more than I expected. A great immersive way to learn about the history of this place. I was surprised by the quality of the visuals, the story telling, and the depth. Very nice! Please make more of these, it could be a great educational tool.
The story and animations are impressive a novel way to learn about the history of Jerusalem, as led by personal stories from the time, the last scene is the most impressive

reviews.review_title: Do Not Purchase this rip-off product
reviews.review_description: Cardo is not worth the money. You cannot move in this at all. You watch and listen to a short, non interactive history of a different site in Israel. The whole thing is short. You'll never watch it again. You'll get more information and a better view by watching a YouTube video about Cardo and Israel. It takes longer to purchase, download and install this than it does to watch the videos. The app is also buggy, I had to restart 3 times before I could even use the controller to point at the menu. You've been warned. Do not purchase this app.

developer_response.body: We regret your review, the application is meant as a history review with over 30 minutes of content, it is intended for ease of use, for all ages, and is story based - not an interactive application, the user can walk around the scene physically if they have a room boundary,  your comment on a short video  is hardly representative. With all that said, and we understand your disappointment as you were expecting a game

reviews.review_description: A great way to explore cultural heritage and history with this amazing story based VR experience
This is a short carton movie in black and with with 360 view for what??  I am really not impress.

developer_response.body:
Dear Pat - Thank you for the feedback, but seems you are not loading the content properly.  There are a lot of stations with character animations, and over 30 min of a story, so not sure if you even managed to enter the application, try clicking enter on the lobby screen:).
After you click on the langue button - Enter in English, you should start a story with a boy introducing you, you have an open menu so you can select different chapters and areas in the chapters,  it should be very simple, and hopefully you will manage and update your review, feel free to contact us at  if you have any further issues.
you need to use the controls and aim the controller to the buttons. let us know if this was your issue.
